description: Telegram personal-account MCP (MTProto user-auth). Read DMs, send messages, search across chats.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.auroracapital/claude-ops-telegram-server

environmentVariables.description: Numeric API ID from https://my.telegram.org/apps (create a personal app, not a bot).
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_API_ID

environmentVariables.description: API hash from the same my.telegram.org/apps page.
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_API_HASH

environmentVariables.description: Your Telegram phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +14155551234).
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_PHONE

environmentVariables.description: gram.js StringSession token. Generate once via: node index.js --auth (prompts for SMS code + optional 2FA). Store in your secret manager — never commit.
environmentVariables.name: TELEGRAM_SESSION
